segments.narrative: En Lisboa, un águila majestuosa se eleva.
segments.visual_prompt: Ultra-wide shot from below, looking up at a magnificent golden eagle soaring against a dramatic, cloudy sunset sky over Lisbon, golden hour lighting, cinematic, photorealistic, 8k, documentary style.

segments.narrative: No es solo un símbolo. Es la "Mística" del Benfica.
segments.visual_prompt: Dynamic drone shot pulling back from a tightly packed stadium crowd waving thousands of red flags, revealing the iconic Estádio da Luz bathed in floodlights at night, electric atmosphere, 8k, sports documentary style, high energy.

Sepia-toned historical photograph reenactment of a group of young men in early 20th-century attire, huddled together discussing passionately around a simple wooden table under dim gaslight, period-accurate, 4k, vintage documentary aesthetic.

segments.narrative: Desde inicios humildes, un gigante emergió.
segments.visual_prompt: Close-up of a weathered, old football made of thick leather, lying on a dusty, uneven grass pitch in a historical setting, dappled sunlight, photorealistic, 8k, nostalgic, shallow depth of field.

segments.narrative: Su casa: el Estádio da Luz. La "Catedral".
segments.visual_prompt: Sweeping aerial shot of Estádio da Luz from a helicopter, perfectly illuminated at twilight, showcasing its modern architecture and the surrounding Lisbon cityscape, vibrant, 8k, architectural cinematography.
Overhead shot of a vibrant, packed stadium stand, a sea of red jerseys and flags, hands waving in unison as the crowd roars, high energy, intense colors, stadium lighting, 8k, sports photography.

segments.narrative: Y en su corazón, la leyenda Eusébio.
segments.visual_prompt: Archival footage style still, iconic black and white image of Eusébio mid-sprint with the ball, his powerful legs driving forward, intense focus on his face, classic football photography style, grain effect, 4k.
Cinematic close-up of a vintage football boot (early 60s style) striking an old leather football, motion blur, dramatic sidelighting, low angle, photorealistic, 8k, sports action.

segments.narrative: Un ícono global que trascendió el deporte.
segments.visual_prompt: Historical photograph style, a jubilant Eusébio being hoisted onto the shoulders of teammates after scoring, bright stadium lights, crowd in background cheering, 4k, celebratory mood, black and white.

segments.narrative: Dos Copas de Europa. Momentos gloriosos.
segments.visual_prompt: Dynamic close-up of a gleaming, silver European Cup trophy being lifted high by triumphant players in vintage red Benfica jerseys, confetti falling, bright stadium lights, 60s photography style, 8k.

Dark, atmospheric shot of an old, weathered portrait painting of Béla Guttmann, with a subtle, ominous shadow falling across his face, historical painting style, low key lighting, 4k, mysterious, slight vintage film grain.

segments.narrative: Ocho finales perdidas. Una búsqueda incesante.
segments.visual_prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a solemn-faced Benfica player walking off the pitch after a lost final, head down, distant stadium lights, rain subtly falling, dramatic and melancholic, photorealistic, 8k.

segments.narrative: La cantera: el futuro se forja aquí.
segments.visual_prompt: Hopeful shot of young, aspiring football players (around 10-12 years old) training intensely at Benfica's Caixa Futebol Campus, focused expressions, modern training facilities in background, bright daylight, 8k, sports development, energetic.

segments.narrative: Más de 200.000 socios. Un ejército rojo.
segments.visual_prompt: Immersive first-person view from the heart of the "Curva Sul" at Estádio da Luz, surrounded by thousands of ecstatic fans wearing red, singing loudly, red smoke flares in distance, raw energy, 8k, fan perspective, handheld camera feel.

segments.narrative: Su pasión, el motor de un gigante.
segments.visual_prompt: Close-up of a weathered hand passionately clutching a worn Benfica scarf, veins visible, focused on the textures of the fabric and skin, dramatic low lighting, photorealistic, 8k, emotional, intimate.
Artistic shot of a single, vibrant red Benfica jersey hanging proudly in a locker room, empty benches, soft ambient light streaming through a window, sense of anticipation, 8k, contemplative, filmic.

segments.narrative: Es historia, esperanza, y una "Mística" eterna.
segments.visual_prompt: Slow-motion shot of the Benfica eagle mascot flying gracefully from one end of Estádio da Luz to the other, silhouetted against the bright stadium lights, awe-inspiring, 8k, iconic moment, soaring motion.

segments.narrative: El águila siempre volará. ¡Viva o Benfica!
segments.visual_prompt: Epic wide shot of Estádio da Luz illuminated at night, viewed from a slightly elevated position, fireworks exploding in the sky above, illuminating the stadium in brilliant colors, celebratory atmosphere, 8k, grand finale, drone view.
